videos.title: HTML Audio Tag Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to use the HTML audio tag to embed audio files into your web pages. Covers all attributes, source fallbacks, and basic JavaScript integration.

videos.title: JavaScript Audio API Tutorial
videos.description: Comprehensive tutorial on the JavaScript Audio API covering playback control, audio visualization, and audio processing.

videos.title: Web Audio API Deep Dive
videos.description: In-depth exploration of the Web Audio API including AudioContext, AnalyserNode, audio visualization, and real-time effects.

videos.title: HTML5 Audio and Video
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers everything about HTML5 audio and video elements including attributes, format support, and building custom controls.

videos.title: Build a Custom Audio Player with JavaScript
videos.description: Step-by-step guide to building a fully custom audio player from scratch with play/pause, seek bar, volume control, and playlist functionality.

videos.title: Create an Audio Visualizer with Canvas and Web Audio API
videos.description: Learn to build a real-time audio visualizer using the Canvas API and Web Audio API frequency analysis.

videos.title: Understanding AudioContext and Web Audio API
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the AudioContext, audio graphs, and how to process audio programmatically in the browser.
